violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the receiving area, are still not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The dishwasher is still lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The flooring around the grease trap remains in poor repair. Tiles are missing around the trap. Flooring must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the small milk chest cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the receiving area, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of the large milk cold hold unit observed in poor repair and must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The dishwasher is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The grease trap in the floor is rusted and the flooring around the grease trap is disintegrated/missing tiles. Flooring must remain smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The receiving doors are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023

The presence of ants is not controlled as evidenced by sand ant mounds) and a couple of ants along the wall behind the dishwasher. In addition, a couple of mouse droppings observed along the walls. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. These kitchen areas must be thoroughly cleaned. Facility does have active pest control. Pest service must be increased as needed to eliminate these issues. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
Large lift-up cold hold gasket observed in poor repair and is being held in place by tape. Gasket must be properly repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Can opener that is being used is not durable for the commercial cans being opened. This can opener is easily breakable risking physical contamination of foods. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
Dishwasher is still lacking a proper air gap. Air gap must be created. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The grease trap and the floor around the grease trap remain in poor repair. Tiles are missing and grease trap is rusted and peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The floor drains in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
